auth.signInSubtitle: Welcome back — sign in to your workspace.
auth.name: Your name
auth.brandTitle: See which ad actually makes money.
auth.brandSubtitle: AdLink joins Meta Ads spend to your CRM revenue — attribution down to the single ad.
auth.feat1Desc: Every lead traced back to the ad that earned it.
auth.feat2Desc: CPL, CAC, ROAS — profit, not vanity metrics.
auth.feat3Desc: Feed quality signals back so spend chases revenue.
auth.telegramConfirm: Press “Start” in the Telegram bot — you'll be signed in automatically.
auth.qrTitle: Sign in with a QR code
auth.qrHint: Confirm in Telegram — you'll be signed in on this computer automatically
auth.qrConfirmSubtitle: Choose one of the methods below
auth.qrApprovedHint: Return to your computer — you're signed in.
auth.qrExpiredHint: Open a fresh QR code on your computer.

connections.title: Connections
connections.subtitle: Connect Meta and your CRM, map stages, then run a sync.
connections.clientsDesc: Every ad account & CRM is attached to a client (a brand you run ads for).
connections.noClients: No clients yet — add one to start connecting.
connections.metaDesc: Pulls spend, ads and lead forms.
connections.crmDesc: Bitrix24 or amoCRM — leads, deals, stages.
connections.listDesc: Ad platforms and CRMs attached to your clients.
connections.noConnections: No connections yet — add one to start.
connections.pickPlatformDesc: Pick what you want to connect.
connections.fSystemTokenHint: A System User token with ads_read. Encrypted at rest.
connections.fWebhookHint: The portal address is detected automatically from this URL.
connections.metaOauthNote: You'll be redirected to Facebook to authorize, then choose which ad accounts to import.
connections.metaFailed: Couldn't connect Meta. Please try again.
connections.metaPickDesc: Choose which ad accounts to import.
connections.metaNoAccounts: No ad accounts found for this Facebook account.
